nasb.text: Having eyes, do you not see? And having ears, do you not hear? And do you not remember,

esv.text: Having eyes do you not see, and having ears do you not hear? And do you not remember?

cnv.text: 你們有眼不能看，有耳不能聽嗎？你們不記得嗎？

ccb.text: 你们有眼不会看，有耳不会听吗？你们不记得吗？

csbs.text: 你们有眼睛却看不见，有耳朵却听不见吗？难道不记得吗？
